ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] ExplosiveCoderflome/AI-Novel-Writing-Assistant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ExplosiveCoderflome/AI-Novel-Writing-Assistant
Language: typescript
面向长篇小说创作的 AI Native 开源系统，用 Agent、世界观、写法引擎、RAG 和整本生产工作流，帮助新手从一句灵感走到完整小说。AI-native engine for end-to-end novel creation — from idea to full chapters, with structured planning, worldbuilding, and agent-driven workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/last-byte/PersistenceSniper
Language: powershell
Powershell module that can be used by Blue Teams, Incident Responders and System Administrators to hunt persistences implanted in Windows machines. Official Twitter/X account @PersistSniper. Made with ❤️ by @last0x00 and @dottor_morte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] QuiteAFancyEmerald/InvisiProxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuiteAFancyEmerald/InvisiProxy
Language: javascript
InvisiProxy LTS is a web proxy service that helps you access websites that may be blocked by your network, government or policy all within your browser with no download or setup. It does this securely and with additional privacy features. Browse Tor/Onion sites in any browser, hide browsing activity and bypass filters. (Star if you fork it!)
